name: life-os
description: The master life management skill. Scores all life domains (health, career, finances, relationships, learning, projects), identifies imbalances and neglected areas, generates balanced weekly plans with micro-goals, runs daily check-ins and weekly/monthly reviews, and orchestrates sub-skills (daily-planner, habit-builder, workout-planner, nutrition-optimizer, skill-acquisition-engine) into a unified life operating system.
